package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_time_now_called_many_times_per_item: Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag repeated time.Now calls inside per-item loops where one timestamp would suffice.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario548Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
